creator: dag-erli@ifi.uio.no
text:
groggy@iname.com writes:
>         #!/bin/sh
>         #echo ~/.shinit
>         a="alias|sort|more"
>         q="cd /home/user; ls"

That's not going to work. Use:

alias a='alias|sort|more'
alias q='cd $HOME; ls'

DES
-- 
Dag-Erling Smørgrav - dag-erli@ifi.uio.no
